description: Get a single package by its canonical (did, slug) identity. EXPERIMENTAL.

main.description: Returns the aggregator's view of one package, including the signed profile record, denormalised metadata for display, and any hydrated labels. Returns NotFound if the aggregator has no record of this (did, slug) pair, or if the package has been tombstoned.

errors.name: NotFound
errors.description: No package indexed under the given (did, slug). Aggregators that hard-delete on publisher deletion (rather than soft-deleting) return NotFound for both the never-indexed and the deleted cases — clients should treat them equivalently.
